stories.title: Pegula Wins Charleston — First Back-to-Back Champion Since Serena (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text: Jessica Pegula wins Charleston 6-2, 6-2. Back-to-back champion. First player to defend the title since Serena Williams in 2013. Her 11th career title, 2nd of 2026. Dominant. 🎾 #TennisFanrecap #CharlestonOpen #WTA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text: Pegula dropped just 8 games in the Charleston final. Starodubtseva's Cinderella run met its end in 82 minutes. That's what the No. 5 in the world looks like at her best. #TennisFanrecap #CharlestonOpen #WTA

stories.title: Jodar (19) Wins Marrakech — Youngest Champion in Event History (Tier 1)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text: Rafael Jodar is 19 years old. He was outside the top 900 a year ago. Today he won his first ATP title in Marrakech, 6-3, 6-2 — youngest champion in tournament history. What a rise. #TennisFanrecap #Marrakech #ATP

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text: The Marrakech final: Jodar (19) def. Trungelliti (36) 6-3, 6-2. One of the five largest age gaps in an ATP final since 1990. Two firsts: Jodar's first title, Trungelliti's first final. History all around. #TennisFanrecap #Marrakech #ATP

stories.title: Navone Wins Bucharest — First ATP Title (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text: Navone wins Bucharest, his first ATP title. Trailed 1-3 in the third set, then won four straight to close it out 6-2, 4-6, 7-5. Argentina with two finalists on clay this weekend — Navone delivers. #TennisFanrecap #TiriacOpen #ATP

stories.title: Monte Carlo Day 1 — Monfils Wins, Humbert Earns Sinner Clash (Tier 2)

x_posts.label: Post 4-1
x_posts.text: Monte Carlo Day 1 results: Monfils d. Griekspoor 6-7, 6-1, 6-4 (record-breaking milestone). Humbert d. Kouame 6-3, 7-5 — faces Sinner in R2. Rublev d. Borges. Norrie d. Kecmanovic 6-2, 4-6, 7-6. Clay season is on. #TennisFanrecap #MonteCarlo #ATP

x_posts.label: Post 4-2
x_posts.text: Humbert beat Kouame in R1 at Monte Carlo. Next up: Jannik Sinner. After winning Indian Wells and Miami without dropping a set, that's the next test. R2 coming up. #TennisFanrecap #MonteCarlo #ATP

stories.title: Swiatek Hires Francisco Roig — Nadal's Former Coach (Tier 3)

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text: Iga Swiatek has hired Francisco Roig as her new coach. Roig guided Nadal from 2005 to 2022 — 14 Roland Garros titles. Swiatek trained at the Rafa Nadal Academy to start. Stuttgart is April 13. #TennisFanrecap #WTA #Swiatek
